description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- refactor(components): update go pro assets by @zevnda in #1761
- chore(i18n): update pro faq string by @zevnda in #1763
- doc: simplify ads by @zevnda in #1772
- fix(tauri): window not focused after update by @zevnda in #1773
- refactor(components): improve update download screen by @zevnda in #1774
Full Changelog: 5.3.7...5.3.8
